title: ctenitis dissecta
intro: Ctenitis dissecta, also known as the cut-leaf fern, is a species of fern native to Asia, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Ctenitis dissecta is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of digestive problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
